title: Update UTC timezone display format and add local time above UTC Offset Selection

requirements.text: In WebsiteLayoutPanel, modify the local time display format to show the UTC offset within the date string (e.g., 'February 24, 2026 (UTC +8)' instead of separate UTC+8 label). The XPath for the element to modify is /html[1]/body[1]/div[3]/div[2]/div[2]/div[2]/div[1]/div[2]/div[2]/div[1]/strong[3].

quotes: What i want to show is Local Time: February 24, 2026 (UTC +8)

acceptanceCriteria: Local time displays in format 'Month Day, Year (UTC +/-offset)' where offset is calculated from the default search location
The display updates when default search location changes
The format shows the timezone offset of the local time, not UTC+0

requirements.text: In LocationMapExplorer, add a display above the 'Select UTC Offset' button that shows the current local time and its UTC offset in the same format as REQ-1 (e.g., 'Local Time: February 24, 2026 (UTC +8)'). The XPath for reference is /html[1]/body[1]/div[3]/div[2]/div[2]/div[2]/div[1]/div[2]/div[2]/div[1]/strong[2].

quotes: Under the UTC Offset Selection, add the Local Time and the respective UTC above the Select UTC Offset

acceptanceCriteria: Local time with UTC offset displays above the 'Select UTC Offset' button
Display updates in real-time as the globe location changes
Format matches the WebsiteLayoutPanel format: 'Month Day, Year (UTC +/-offset)'

constraints: Do not modify the current UI layout structure
Do not change the 3D globe component or its functionality
Preserve all existing features and components
nonGoals: Modifying other UI panels or components beyond WebsiteLayoutPanel and LocationMapExplorer
Altering the UTC offset selection functionality itself
